sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I can see the character has moved RIGHT. The white body is now overlapping more with the green frame. The character is now on the RIGHT side of the green frame. Let me check the green count.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
green_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
red_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R')
gray_total = sum(n['pixels'] for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G')
print(f"Green: {green_total}, Red: {red_total}, Gray: {gray_total}")

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] != 'S':
        minr = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        minc = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={minr}-{maxr} cols={minc}-{maxc}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
